text.title: External Secrets Operator Recipe Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply the methodology end-to-end.

step.name: install-eso
step.action: Helm install ESO. Apply via Flux/Argo.

step.name: configure-cluster-secret-store
step.action: Apply ClusterSecretStore with identity auth. Validate access by listing secrets.
step.note: Gate: If auth fails, STOP — check identity binding + backend policy.

step.name: create-external-secrets
step.action: Author ExternalSecret per service. Set refreshInterval per r2. Mount as files.

step.name: wire-alerts
step.action: Alert on sync_calls_error_total + on ExternalSecret status != Ready.

step.name: rotation-test
step.action: Rotate backend secret. Wait refreshInterval. Confirm pod sees new value.
